x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Service User (PSU)
x-enumeration-literals.description: A natural or legal person making use of a payment service as a payee, payer or both (PSD2 Article 4(10)).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Servicing Payment Service Provider (ASPSP)
x-enumeration-literals.description: An ASPSP is a PSP that provides and maintains a payment account for a payment services user (PSD 2 Article 4(15).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third Party Provider (TPP)
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party other than an ASPSP that provides payment related services.
